auto_resume.description: Specifies whether to automatically resume a service when a service function or ingress is called.

current_instances.description: The current number of instances for the service.

target_instances.description: The target number of service instances that should be running as determined by Snowflake.

min_ready_instances.description: The minimum number of ready service instances to declare the service as READY.

min_instances.description: Specifies the minimum number of service instances to run.

max_instances.description: Specifies the maximum number of service instances to run.

database_name.description: The name of the parent database for the service.

schema_name.description: The name of the parent schema for the service.

dns_name.description: Snowflake-assiged DNS name of the service. The DNS name enables service-to-service communications.

created_on.description: Timestamp when the service was created.

updated_on.description: Timestamp when the service was last updated.

resumed_on.description: Timestamp when the service was last resumed.

suspended_on.description: Timestamp when the service was last suspended.

auto_suspend_secs.description: Number of seconds of inactivity after which the service will be automatically suspended. The default value is 0 which represents the service will not be automatically suspended.

owner_role_type.description: The role type of the service owner.

is_job.description: True if the service is a job service; false otherwise.

spec_digest.description: The unique and immutable identifier representing the service spec content.

is_upgrading.description: TRUE, if Snowflake is in the process of upgrading the service.

managing_object_domain.description: The domain of the managing object (for example, the domain of the notebook that manages the service). NULL if the service is not managed by a Snowflake entity.

managing_object_name.description: The name of the managing object (for example, the name of the notebook that manages the service). NULL if the service is not managed by a Snowflake entity.
